R0194.title: EIP/Protocol Phishing Attack
R0194.definition: Attackers exploit vulnerabilities in Ethereum Improvement Proposals (EIP) or other blockchain protocol features to craft phishing transactions that trick users into signing malicious authorizations.

references.title: H1 2025 Blockchain Security and Anti-Money Laundering Report - SlowMist

R0194.description: Attackers exploit vulnerabilities in Ethereum Improvement Proposals (EIP) or other blockchain protocol features to craft phishing transactions that trick users into signing malicious authorizations.
R0194.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
